problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
hypothesis: Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus may resolve Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
